claims.statement: On this machine and the recorded one-million-cell mixed-inline level-1 targeted-upsert workload, the simple inline-string fast path reduced parser, source-callback and transform-action traffic by 22.73%, 17.24% and 31.23%; transform median fell by 21.10% and total editor median fell by 24.57% while process peak working set stayed effectively flat.

The optimized mixed-inline profile consumed 333327 complete simple inline payloads and 7895685 exact source bytes through the fast path with 6 boundary fallbacks; the representative output opened with openpyxl 3.1.2.

The formula plus external hyperlink guard reported zero inline-string fast-path traffic, opened with openpyxl 3.1.2 and preserved the recorded hyperlink target; focused formula/hyperlink tests also passed.

Production and stored-only CTest passed 132/132; no-images and production/stored/no-images install-consumer profiles passed. Office was not run, and no cross-machine, arbitrary-workbook or full-feature superiority claim is made.
